title: Package Salesforce External Client App as 2GP Managed Package
description:
Package the DataTools Pro Salesforce external client app as a second-generation managed package (2GP) for distribution to customers. This allows customers to install the package in their org without manually creating the external client app.

### Process
1. Bundle the external client app into a 2GP managed package for version control and automated packaging
2. Distribute via AppExchange or direct installation
3. OAuth consumer credentials are stored in a non-ephemeral org (Dev Hub) and shared globally, not included in the package

### Benefits
- Customers don't need to create the external client app manually
- Version control and automated packaging
- Multiple packages under the same namespace
- Sensitive OAuth credentials securely managed outside the package
acceptance_criteria: External client app is packaged as a 2GP managed package
Package can be installed in a customer Salesforce org
OAuth credentials are not included in the package
implementation_notes: This was completed as part of MBT-1306. OAuth consumer credentials are stored in the Dev Hub org and shared globally across deployments.
comment_summary: Developer noted this was completed in the related task MBT-1306.
